name: Orie
headline: Young author. Big imagination. Words that take you somewhere new.
bioParagraphs: I am Orie, and I have been writing stories for as long as I can remember. It started with scribbled adventures in composition notebooks — tales about brave kids, magical animals, and worlds just a little different from ours. Somewhere along the way, the scribbles turned into chapters, and the chapters turned into actual books.

When I am not writing, you can find me reading (obviously), exploring new places, or trying to convince my family that we need more bookshelves. I am inspired by authors who make you feel something real — who build worlds you do not want to leave and characters who feel like friends.

I write because I believe stories have the power to make us braver, kinder, and more curious. And I think young voices have just as much to say as anyone else. Thanks for being here — I am really glad you found your way to my little corner of the book world.
funFacts: 📚 Favorite book: too many to pick just one
✍️ Writing fuel: hot chocolate and lo-fi music
🌍 Dream: to write a book that ends up on someone's changed-my-life list
🐾 Fun fact: I name all my characters before I know what they look like
